name: grok-build-codex
description: Stateful Grok Build bridge with detached execution, live progress, usage metrics, and Codex-owned review workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Plan in Codex, follow Grok live, then review and validate.
interface.longDescription: A fast stateful bridge from Codex to the local Grok Build CLI with detached implementation workers, compact live progress, usage metrics, cancellation, session resume, and Codex-owned review gates.
defaultPrompt: Use $delegate-to-grok to plan this task, delegate implementation to Grok, and review the result.
Check whether the Grok Build bridge is ready and show recent tracked runs.
Import this Codex task into Grok, then prepare a bounded implementation handoff.
